title: Fallenflower's Server Economy
description: A simple economy system for Neoforge server.Inspired by Vault.Made with Mcreator.
body:
This mod is my first project in Modrinth.

Fallenflower's Server Economy is a simple economy system for Neoforge server.

 

Currently, this mod has just 3 features:

1.Ingame real currency includes playerpoints, gems and coins.

2.Saving and withdrawaling.

3.Currency payment between players.

 

This project is still WIP, and I plan to add the following features next:

1.Chest based player store

2.Player global shop

3.Customizable Interfaces

4.More currency

5./trade command
